radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the subscription plan radio button group, including the list of plan options, their visual style, and purchase behavior.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the selection indicator on the radio button. Possible values: 'right' (indicator on right side), 'none' (no indicator shown), or any other value defaults to left alignment.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

buttons.description: List of individual radio button items in the subscription plan selector. Each item references a subscription button component and defines its visual states.

badge.description: Optional badge displayed on the radio button, typically used to highlight a saving or promotion (e.g. 'Save 30%').

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

color.description: Text color of the badge when the radio button is selected. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

variant.description: Visual style variant of the badge, controlling its appearance (e.g. shape or emphasis).

hide_on_deselected_state.description: When true, the badge is hidden when the radio button is in the deselected state.

text.description: Text displayed inside the badge on the radio button. May contain '%%packageId%%' placeholders that are replaced at runtime with pricing or package information.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color applied to the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color applied to the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Color value from the backend/API.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

selected_border_color.description: Border color applied to the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is selected by default when the screen is first displayed.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, renders the radio button in an enlarged/expanded layout.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'subscription_button' remote settings list. Used to look up the full subscription button configuration for this radio button item.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color applied to the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Color value from the backend/API.

border_color.description: Border color applied to the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Color value from the backend/API.

gradient_type.description: Specifies the gradient style applied to the radio button background.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, selecting a radio button immediately triggers the purchase flow without requiring the user to tap a separate CTA button.

type.description: Determines the visual style of the radio button group. 'tiers_style' renders buttons in tiers style (RadioButtonsType.TiersStyle); any other value uses the default style (RadioButtonsType.DefaultStyle).

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the toggle that allows users to opt in to a trial reminder notification.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the trial reminder toggle is shown on the screen. Defaults to false if not specified.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings list. Used to look up the trial reminder toggle configuration.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration reference for the text displayed as a placeholder or label next to the package switch toggle.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the toggle placeholder text component is shown on the screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings list. Used to look up the placeholder text shown near the toggle.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for this screen configuration. Used to match the screen variant requested by the app (e.g. the touchpoint or screen name). Falls back to the 'default' entry if no exact match is found.

footer.description: Configuration reference for the footer component on the offer screen. Defined in the API model but not currently mapped to a rendered view in the known source.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the footer component is shown on the screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID used to look up the footer component configuration from remote settings.

banner.description: Configuration reference for the banner image or media component displayed at the top of the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner component is shown on the screen. When false, the banner view is skipped.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings list. Used to look up the banner image/media configuration.

description.description: Configuration reference for the description component on the offer screen. Defined in the API model but not currently mapped to a rendered view in the known source.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the description component is shown on the screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID used to look up the description component configuration from remote settings.

title.description: Configuration reference for the main title component displayed at the top of the subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the title component is shown on the screen. When false, the title view is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings list. Used to look up the title text configuration.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

close_button.description: Configuration reference for the close button displayed on the offer screen. Tapping it dismisses the offer.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the close button is shown on the screen. When false, the close button is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings list. Used to look up the close button configuration.

subtitle.description: Configuration reference for the subtitle component displayed below the main title on the subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the subtitle component is shown on the screen. When false, the subtitle view is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings list. Used to look up the subtitle text configuration.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration reference for the banner placeholder text component, displayed in place of a media banner when no banner image is available.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner placeholder text component is shown on the screen. When false, the placeholder is skipped even if an id is provided.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings list. Used to look up the banner placeholder text configuration.

secondary_button.description: Configuration reference for the secondary (underlined text) button on the offer screen. Tapping it either opens a hook URL or a tiers half-screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the secondary button is shown on the screen. When false, the secondary button is hidden.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings list. Used to look up the secondary button configuration.

logo.description: Configuration reference for the logo component on the offer screen. Defined in the API model but not currently mapped to a rendered view in the known source.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the logo component is shown on the screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID used to look up the logo component configuration from remote settings.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the toggle that switches between subscription packages, typically used to toggle between a standard and a free-trial offer.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the package switch toggle (e.g. a free trial toggle) is shown on the screen. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability marker used by the schema generator. Not used by the application logic.

id.description: References the component ID in the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings list. Used to look up the package switch toggle configuration.
